commands: vp migrate --no-interactive 2>&1 # should NOT duplicate fmt/lint blocks already in vite.config.ts (regression for vp create fate)
cat vite.config.ts # exactly one fmt: and one lint: block, preserving template values
test ! -f .oxfmtrc.jsonc && echo '.oxfmtrc.jsonc removed' # redundant standalone file removed
test ! -f .oxlintrc.json && echo '.oxlintrc.json removed' # redundant standalone file removed
